title: Face Crop Sidecar Schema
description: Metadata sidecar for extracted face crops. A union of two variants discriminated by oneOf: (1) video face crops from extract_face_crops_from_videos.py — carry source_video/track_id/duration_seconds; (2) image face crops from extract_face_crops_from_images.py — carry image_path/person_idx. The common FAIR fields (uuid, schema_version, parent_clip) are required for both variants.

uuid.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for this face crop

parent_clip.description: Reference to the parent person clip (video) or image detection (image) this was extracted from

uuid.description: UUID of the parent person clip / image detection

file.description: Filename of the parent person clip / image detection sidecar

source_video.description: Path to the source person clip video (video variant only)

track_id.description: Person tracking ID within the source clip (video variant only)

duration_seconds.description: Total duration of the face crop video (video variant only)

width.description: Frame width in pixels (should be 616 for OFIQ)

height.description: Frame height in pixels (should be 616 for OFIQ)

valid_face_frames.description: Number of frames with valid face detections (video variant)

image_path.description: Path to the source image (image variant only; forward-slash path)

person_idx.description: Index of the person within the source image detections (image variant only)

source_image_size.description: Dimensions of the source image (image variant only)

bbox_in_source.description: Person bounding box [x1, y1, x2, y2] in the source image (image variant)

bbox_confidence.description: Confidence of the person detection bbox (image variant)

keypoints.description: CIGPose 133 keypoints transformed into the face-crop frame (image variant); each keypoint is an [x, y] pair

output_size.description: Output face crop size (e.g., 616 for OFIQ)

frame_data.description: Per-frame data (video variant: array of per-frame dicts; image variant: object indexed by frame number in the source detection sidecar)

face_crop_corners_arcface.description: Four corners of the ArcFace 112x112 region within OFIQ frames

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the crop was extracted

oneOf.description: Video face crop: extracted from a person clip (has source_video, track_id, duration_seconds).
Image face crop: extracted from a still image detection (has image_path, person_idx).
